buildCommand: PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true npm install && npm run build:full

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://widget.packeta.com https://www.ppl.cz; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://widget.packeta.com https://www.ppl.cz; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://widget.packeta.com https://www.ppl.cz https://api.paylibo.com https://drive.google.com https://*.googleusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://n8n.hromadovky.cz https://widget.packeta.com https://ares.gov.cz https://www.ppl.cz; frame-src https://gpwebpay.com https://widget.packeta.com https://drive.google.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self' https://gpwebpay.com
